title: Hermes Context Compression Cover
brief: A blog banner hero illustration for a technical article about AI agent context compression. Visual metaphor: a long unfolding scroll of conversation history (messages, tool calls, file reads) being folded and compressed into a compact glowing handoff summary, layered depth, soft editorial atmosphere, no text labels, no diagrams, no arrows.
